project_reference.core_research_question: What kind of computational object is the 3D Double Meru under surviving evidence, and can that object be reconstructed, falsified, and compared across Mac host and RM10 witness lanes without promoting unrecovered hybrid source into authority?
project_reference.current_focus: Post-Phase 01.2.3.1 RM10-primary branch follow-through: preserve the governed Genesis CPU control family, stabilize the bundled-residue harmonic CPU-vs-GPU feasibility family, decide whether that family bridges to the primary governed lane or remains residue-only, seek one receiptable NPU assist path, and keep explicit heterogeneous execution below promotion until a handoff artifact exists.

scope.question: What kind of computational object is the 3D Double Meru under surviving evidence, and can that object be reconstructed, falsified, and compared across Mac host and RM10 witness lanes without promoting unrecovered hybrid source into authority?
in_scope: Map the manifesto's numbered T01-T236 references to executable evidence or explicit gaps
Reconstruct the 3D Double Meru as a computational object from surviving artifacts, source, binaries, strings, and preserved receipts
Classify late hybrid generations by how faithfully they express or obscure the Double Meru
Replay the recoverable October and Genesis deterministic substrate as witness and anti-delusion baseline
Establish a RM10 Pro device replay lane with receipts and Comet metadata
Falsify or retain manifesto and hybrid claims based on source-backed replay evidence
out_of_scope: Declaring the newer hybrid DM3 layer recovered
Treating manifesto prose as executable proof
Using visual geometry demos or aesthetic coherence as success
Letting the deterministic witness layer displace the Double Meru as the scientific object
Rebuilding GPU, HRM, scar-engine, or micro-transformer layers before witness replay and authority-gate definition
unresolved_questions: What is the strongest surviving description of the 3D Double Meru as a computational object rather than an aesthetic geometry?
Which late hybrid structures appear faithful to that object, and which appear ornamental or parasitic?
Which Genesis verify.json canonical is authoritative across the Mac lane, the historical RM10 parity lane, and the newer phone-local lanes?
Can the current RM10 ADB-shell replay surface be promoted from a prebuilt-stub lane to a true source-build parity lane?

user_asserted_anchors: Start from scratch in a new space
Re-run the numbered tests and falsify them
Use the RM10 Pro as a real device lane
Do not inherit narrative wins from unrecovered source
Treat the 3D Double Meru as the primary scientific object
Treat the deterministic baseline as witness rather than protagonist
known_good_baselines: ../recovery/zer0pamk1-DM-3-Oct/snic passes cargo check and cargo test on the Mac host
../recovery/Zer0paMk1-Genesis-Organism-Executable-Application-27-Oct-2025/TESTING_PROTOCOL.md defines the strongest recovered deterministic replay protocol
artifacts/mac_replay/ledger.md records fresh Mac Genesis and October receipts
artifacts/rm10_replay/historical_t1_t7_20251028/* records an older RM10 Genesis parity surface matching the fresh Mac hashes
context_gaps: The manifesto T01-T236 numbering is not yet mapped one-to-one to source-backed executable artifacts
The newer hybrid DM3 layer remains source-missing
A bounded non-stub late-hybrid observable has not yet been recovered
The current phone genesis_cli validator rejects both fresh device bundles under its default canonical target
The fresh phone lanes currently depend on prebuilt device binaries and a cargo stub
crucial_inputs: RM10 Pro is a replay lane, not proof by itself
The restart repo is the canonical re-engineering space
Receipts and ledgers outrank demos and descriptions
Hybrid residue is evidence about the Double Meru, not the object of recovery by itself

formulations: hybrid residue as evidence about the geometry rather than authority by itself
deterministic cross-platform replay with explicit receipts
source-backed witness baseline before any hybrid rebuild
allowed_estimator_families: explicit claim mapping against repo protocols and ledgers
binary-to-asset pairing with preserved residue and explicit blocker logging
forbidden_estimator_families: unrecovered hybrid intuition presented as implementation truth
allowed_fit_families: hybrid generation split and fidelity analysis
bounded substantive recovery attempts with explicit blocker proof
forbidden_fit_families: full hybrid rebuild before baseline replay
graphical concept polish as a substitute for falsification
letting the witness baseline substitute for reconstructing the Double Meru
stop_and_rethink_conditions: Most manifesto Txx claims cannot be mapped to source-backed executable artifacts
The Double Meru cannot be described as a computational object from surviving evidence without collapsing into aesthetic rhetoric
The recoverable baseline cannot replay deterministically on the Mac host
RM10 Pro replay yields unexplained divergence on the source-backed battery
The authority metric collapses into demos, aesthetics, or internal proxy scores

observables.name: Manifesto test-map coverage
observables.definition: Fraction of manifesto test labels used in restart planning that are mapped to executable evidence or explicit gaps

observables.name: Deterministic receipt parity
observables.definition: Whether repeated Mac and RM10 Pro runs yield matching or explicitly equivalent receipts and hashes

observables.name: Energy or Lyapunov witness trace
observables.definition: Source-backed trace used to assess monotonic descent or stable settling in the restart battery

observables.name: Fixed-point replay obligation
observables.definition: Requirement that the same source-backed input and seed produce the same fixed point or an explicitly equivalent receipt

observables.name: Double Meru geometry role classification
observables.definition: Evidence-backed classification of the Double Meru as substrate, routing structure, memory structure, relaxation field, boundary readout body, or combination

observables.name: Hybrid fidelity classification
observables.definition: Evidence-backed classification of surviving hybrid generations as faithful to, layered on top of, or parasitic upon the Double Meru geometry

observables.name: Runtime truth split
observables.definition: Separation of authority-bearing, substantive, smoke-only, inspectable-only, and blocked runtime surfaces

claims.statement: The surviving evidence is sufficient to classify the Double Meru as a computational geometry without collapsing it into either pure aesthetic residue or unrecovered mythology.
The surviving hybrid generations can be split and classified by fidelity to the reconstructed Double Meru geometry.
Every manifesto test reference used downstream is either mapped to source-backed evidence or explicitly marked unmapped.
The recoverable October and Genesis substrate can be rebuilt and replayed deterministically on the Mac host with receipts.
The RM10 Pro can execute the selected source-backed restart battery and produce matching or explicitly justified equivalent receipts.

deliverables.description: Evidence-backed reconstruction of the Double Meru as a computational geometry
Generation split and fidelity classification for the surviving hybrid residue
Source-backed mapping of manifesto Txx labels to recovered evidence or explicit gaps
Mac host replay ledger for the selected source-backed restart battery
RM10 Pro replay ledger for the selected source-backed restart battery

acceptance_tests.subject: claim_double_meru_geometry
acceptance_tests.procedure: Assemble source, archaeology, and runtime anchors; classify the Double Meru geometry and name what remains only hypothesis.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: The geometry dossier separates recovered fact, plausible hypothesis, and contradicted readings clearly enough to guide the next phase.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim_hybrid_fidelity
acceptance_tests.procedure: Split the surviving hybrid line into generations and classify each by fidelity to the reconstructed geometry, runtime truth, and contamination boundaries.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: No surviving hybrid generation remains collapsed into a single story; each is labeled faithful, layered, parasitic, or unresolved with an evidence basis.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim_manifesto_mapping
acceptance_tests.procedure: Enumerate every manifesto Txx label cited in restart planning and record a source locator or an explicit gap classification.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: No cited Txx label remains unclassified as mapped, collapsed, unmapped, or retired.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim_host_baseline
acceptance_tests.procedure: Run the selected source-backed deterministic battery on the Mac host and preserve receipts, hashes, and logs.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: All selected host baseline runs complete with matching or explicitly justified equivalent receipts and no unexplained drift.

acceptance_tests.subject: claim_rm10_replay
acceptance_tests.procedure: Run the same selected source-backed battery on the RM10 Pro Termux or ADB lane and compare the resulting receipts against the host ledger.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: RM10 Pro replay completes with matching or explicitly justified equivalent receipts; unexplained drift is a failure.

references.why_it_matters: Source of the numbered T01-T236 claims that must be mapped, reduced, or falsified
Strongest recovered deterministic replay and ledger-governance protocol
Provides concrete CLI commands for deterministic replay and lineage batch checks
Strongest recoverable source-backed geometry and settling substrate

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim_double_meru_geometry
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Treating elegant geometry language or remembered Double-Meru stories as recovered computational fact without surviving anchors
forbidden_proxies.reason: Would replace reconstruction with reverence and erase the falsification gate

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim_hybrid_fidelity
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Letting the nearest runnable hybrid surface define the Double Meru or count as fidelity proof by convenience
forbidden_proxies.reason: Would invert the mandate and promote executability over the scientific object

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim_manifesto_mapping
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Treating manifesto prose as evidence without a source locator or executable artifact
forbidden_proxies.reason: Would convert the restart into a narratable win instead of a mapped claim registry

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim_host_baseline
forbidden_proxies.proxy: A geometry render or attractive convergence demo without deterministic receipts and ledgers
forbidden_proxies.reason: Would look impressive while skipping the source-backed authority gate

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim_rm10_replay
forbidden_proxies.proxy: Phone shell access, Termux setup, or a partial command path without reproducing the selected battery
forbidden_proxies.reason: Would treat infrastructure readiness as scientific replay success

weakest_anchors: The manifesto T01-T236 numbering exists in prose but is not yet preserved as a source-backed executable registry
unvalidated_assumptions: The source-backed October and Genesis lineage covers enough of the Double Meru to constrain later hybrid interpretations
The computational field-computer hypothesis survives geometry reconstruction as more than metaphor
The RM10 Pro lane will preserve deterministic replay under Termux or ADB conditions
competing_explanations: Only the older deterministic SNIC substrate is real, while stronger Double-Meru and hybrid claims belong to an unrecovered or drifted layer
The late hybrid line may be an ordinary hybrid system borrowing geometry vocabulary rather than a faithful Double-Meru expression
Several manifesto test labels may compress multiple distinct legacy tests into a single narrative statement
disconfirming_observations: The reconstructed geometry cannot be assigned any computational role beyond aesthetic scaffolding
The surviving hybrid line only survives by making the geometry ornamental
Most manifesto test labels cannot be mapped to executable artifacts or canonical ledgers
RM10 Pro replay shows unexplained hash or receipt drift on the source-backed battery

position.current_phase_name: RM10 Primary-Platform Engineering, History Mining, And Heterogeneous Battery Bootstrap
position.last_activity_desc: Refreshed the Phase 01.2.3.1 branch package with a bounded bundled-residue CPU-vs-GPU feasibility compare, stricter governance and battery matrices, and an updated 10-document science-and-engineering pack.

active_calculations: No active long-running computation at the moment.
The last governed executions were Mac Genesis `G-01` and `G-02`, Mac October smoke,
intermediate_results: The manifesto now lives inside the restart repo at `docs/reference/GEOMETRY_FIRST_MANIFESTO.md`.
The recoverable October SNIC substrate compiles and passes its current Rust tests on the Mac host.
The Genesis lineage contains a real deterministic testing protocol, but not a clean one-to-one `T01–T236` registry.
Fresh Mac Genesis `G-01` and `G-02` are internally stable at `verify = e894...` and `solve = 62897...`.
The documented Genesis `verify.json` canonical is stale against the fresh Mac and historical RM10 parity surface.
Fresh RM10 replay now works over ADB shell from `/data/local/tmp`, but the default device validator still rejects both fresh device bundles.
The phone carries two old-work surfaces: a governed SoC runtime lane and a later DM3 hybrid prototype residue with mixed signal.
A fresh `dual_cli` probe re-established the source-backed Double Meru geometry on `2026-04-03`.
The strongest surviving hybrid-specific story is now boundary-plus-nodewise continuation with scar-memory augmentation.
Runtime truth is now split explicitly between geometry witness, governed baseline, smoke-only hybrid callability, inspectable residue, and blocked non-stub recovery.
Phase `01.2.2` fixed the one bounded hybrid target to the bundled RM10 runner plus `SriYantraAdj_v1.bin` and `RegionTags_v2.json`.
The official bundled `exp_g2_readout` inference attempt collapsed exactly to the smoke canonical `d3e721...`.
Phase `01.2.3` exhausted and retired the preserved bundled `G2` same-binary surface on the current callable binary as `phase_outcome=PASS` and `route_outcome=FAIL`.
Witness-floor governance is now frozen around the Mac / historical RM10 parity lane plus an explicit-hash interim rule for fresh RM10 lanes.
Phase `01.2.3.1` wrote the full RM10-primary internal pack, history indexes, device dossier, runbooks, battery matrices, and a merged 10-document branch briefing pack.
A fresh RM10 CPU control pass on `2026-04-05` completed under `/data/local/tmp/SoC_runtime/workspace` with `verify.json = f992e9c8...` and `solve_h2.json = a33c5cc4...`.
The branch now distinguishes two RM10 result families: governed Genesis CPU control on `F1` and bundled-residue harmonic CPU-vs-GPU feasibility on `F2`.
The bounded `dm3_runner` harmonic compare produced same-schema one-episode CPU and GPU-backed receipts on-device, while NPU and explicit heterogeneous role-partition claims remain `ABSTAIN`.
open_questions: Does the historical bundled `G2` residue belong to a neighboring launcher generation, or would recovering it now require explicit redevelopment?
Which Genesis `verify.json` canonical is authoritative across the Mac lane, the historical RM10 parity lane, and the newer phone-local lanes?
Can the current RM10 ADB-shell replay surface be promoted from a prebuilt-stub lane to a true source-build parity lane?
Does the bundled-residue harmonic CPU-vs-GPU family bridge toward the primary governed Genesis family, or should it remain an explicitly separate accelerator-feasibility line?

decisions.summary: Start from scratch in the restart repo and treat the manifesto as a claim inventory, not proof.
Keep the recoverable October / Genesis substrate as the only source-backed baseline.
Use Mac and RM10 Pro as execution lanes, with receipts and Comet metadata.
Switch restart research mode to explore
decisions.rationale: Phase 1 needs explicit branching, pivot analysis, and alternative-hypothesis investigation across battery classes and device lanes.

decisions.summary: Use `/data/local/tmp` as the canonical ADB-shell execution surface and treat shared storage as ingress only.
Treat fresh phone executability and phone acceptance as separate gates; the current blocker is validator governance, not device reachability.
Inserted Phase 01.1 after Phase 01: DM3 Hybrid Archaeology and Recovery (URGENT)
decisions.rationale: Urgent bounded recovery work is needed to separate real hybrid residue from folklore before broader restart execution decisions are made.

decisions.summary: Closed Phase 01.1 with a split hybrid verdict: real late DM3 residue, bounded host executability, no governed hybrid parity yet
decisions.rationale: Phase 01.1 recovered the architecture and proved a bounded receipt-producing host surface, but the work also showed task collapse, missing late-hybrid source/assets, and live RM10 transport loss. The honest next move is a bounded GPU engineering phase, not a rebuild or pass narrative.

decisions.summary: Closed Phase 01.1: late DM3 hybrid line is real and architecturally legible, but only a smoke-level compiled host lane is runnable now; substantive hybrid recovery needs a bounded rebuild phase.
decisions.rationale: Current evidence splits governed Genesis from the later hybrid prototype, proves real GPU/microtx/scar/HRM residue, shows inference-mode host smoke receipts surviving, and shows train-mode substantive tasks remaining asset-blocked.

decisions.summary: Inserted Phase 01.2 after Phase 01: Long-Horizon Recovery Bootstrap and Governance (URGENT)
decisions.rationale: The long-horizon mandate requires custody, governance, runbooks, lane policy, and bounded engineering control work before formal Phase 02 baseline replay continues.

decisions.summary: Inserted Phase 01.2 after Phase 01: Long-Horizon Recovery Bootstrap and Governance (URGENT)
decisions.rationale: The long-horizon mandate requires custody, governance, runbooks, lane policy, and bounded engineering control work before formal Phase 02 baseline replay continues.

decisions.summary: Closed Phase 01.2: long-horizon custody, governance, runbooks, and fresh RM10 preflight are now frozen into a canonical bootstrap pack.
decisions.rationale: The long-horizon mandate required a bounded control-phase before broader Phase 02 replay and repair work. The new pack locks evidence custody, gate A/B verdicts, lane policy, pairing boundaries, and blocker-driven next steps without widening hybrid authority.

decisions.summary: Closed Phase 01.2 with a governed long-horizon bootstrap package
decisions.rationale: Phase 01.2 established custody, refreshed doctrine and runbooks from current evidence, captured live RM10 launch-proof receipts, wrote Gates A-E, and narrowed the next move to canonical governance plus RM10 source-parity repair before deeper hybrid recovery.

decisions.summary: Reframed Phase 01.2.1 after Phase 01.2: Double Meru Scientific Reconstruction And Hybrid Fidelity
decisions.rationale: The corrected mandate makes the 3D Double Meru the primary object of inquiry, so hybrid pairing and non-stub recovery now sit underneath a geometry-first reconstruction and fidelity-classification phase rather than defining the phase by themselves.

decisions.summary: Closed Phase 01.2.1 with a governed Double-Meru-first reconstruction package
decisions.rationale: The phase re-probed the source-backed geometry, classified the late hybrid line by fidelity rather than convenience, split runtime truth from contamination, and narrowed the next move to one bounded non-stub recovery attempt plus witness-lane repair.

decisions.summary: Closed Phase 01.2.2 with a bounded bundled `G2` attempt and witness-floor repair
decisions.rationale: The phase selected the strongest surviving bundled target, froze the Genesis witness-floor split, proved that the official explicit `exp_g2_readout` attempt still collapses exactly to smoke, and narrowed the blocker to invocation-surface recovery rather than generic pairing doubt.

decisions.summary: Inserted Phase 01.2.3 after Phase 01.2.2: G2 Invocation-Surface Archaeology And Router Recovery
decisions.rationale: The next honest move is a bounded router / wrapper / mode-surface archaeology phase on the bundled runner, not GPU escalation or rebuild theatre.

decisions.summary: Closed Phase 01.2.3 with exact same-binary retirement of the bundled `G2` family
decisions.rationale: The phase exhausted the surviving same-binary route surface, froze the result as `phase_outcome=PASS` and `route_outcome=FAIL`, and moved the blocker from route hunting to launcher-adjacency provenance or explicit redevelopment.

decisions.summary: Created hypothesis branch: Engineer the Red Magic 10 Pro into the primary DM3 research instrument and treat heterogeneous CPU/GPU/NPU execution as an early first-class learning path
decisions.rationale: Investigating an RM10-primary, heterogeneity-early alternative programme on branch hypothesis/rm10-primary-platform-heterogeneous-learning

decisions.summary: Inserted Phase 01.2.3.1 after Phase 01.2.3: RM10 Primary-Platform Engineering, History Mining, And Heterogeneous Battery Bootstrap (URGENT)
decisions.rationale: Urgent branch work is needed to test the RM10-primary and heterogeneity-early hypothesis before rejoining the mainline sequence

decisions.summary: Closed Phase 01.2.3.1 with a complete RM10-primary branch bootstrap and first-pass device verdicts
decisions.rationale: The branch now has its full internal pack, history indexes, RM10 runbooks, a receipted CPU control pass, and explicit GPU/NPU/heterogeneous abstain outcomes plus a merged 10-document science-and-engineering pack.

decisions.summary: Supplemented Phase 01.2.3.1 with a bounded bundled-residue CPU-vs-GPU feasibility family
decisions.rationale: The branch now separates the governed Genesis CPU control family from a lower-ceiling `dm3_runner` harmonic compare, records GPU-backed callability without promoting it into primary-lane authority, and keeps NPU plus explicit heterogeneous role partition at abstain.

convention_lock.natural_units: dimensionless computational units unless protocol says otherwise
convention_lock.coordinate_system: graph / lattice coordinates with explicit boundary and bulk labeling
convention_lock.index_positioning: graph / node indices only unless explicitly derived later

pending_todos: Repeat the bundled-residue harmonic CPU-vs-GPU compare with a full identity packet and pre/post telemetry capture.
Decide whether the harmonic CPU-vs-GPU family is only a residue-feasibility line or a bridge toward the primary governed Genesis family.
Determine whether a bounded NPU or DSP assist role can become receiptable on either a governed family or an explicitly lower-ceiling assist family.
Reconcile the Genesis default `verify.json` canonical target against the live Mac and RM10 evidence.
blockers: The manifesto numbering `T01–T236` is not yet a source-backed executable registry.
The newer hybrid DM3 source remains missing.
The blocker is no longer same-binary route hunting; it is whether the historical bundled `G2` residue belongs to a neighboring launcher generation or requires explicit redevelopment.
The current phone `genesis_cli` default validator rejects fresh RM10 bundles and the historical Mac-parity bundle on `verify.json`.
The fresh phone lanes currently depend on prebuilt device binaries and a cargo stub.
No accelerator path yet preserves the primary governed Genesis family.
No receiptable NPU assist path exists yet.
No explicit pre-handoff and post-handoff artifact exists for a heterogeneous role-partition claim.

session.stopped_at: Phase 01.2.3.1 package refreshed with a governed Genesis CPU control family, a bounded bundled-residue harmonic CPU-vs-GPU feasibility family, and updated governance plus battery docs; next step is to stabilize `F2`, decide its relation to `F1`, and keep NPU or explicit heterogeneous work below promotion until their artifacts exist.
